'''dajuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rmgroup|rmgroup]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-j-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rmgroup|rmgroup]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dajuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæjijith|dæjijith]] || [[word:dæjijij|dæjijij]] || [[word:dæjijish|dæjijish]] || [[word:dæjiji|dæjiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dajujujuth|dajujujuth]] || [[word:dajujujuj|dajujujuj]] || [[word:dajujujush|dajujujush]] || [[word:dajujuju|dajujuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dajujuth|dajujuth]] || [[word:dajujuj|dajujuj]] || [[word:dajujush|dajujush]] || [[word:dajuju|dajuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dajufjuth|dajufjuth]] || [[word:dajufjuj|dajufjuj]] || [[word:dajufjush|dajufjush]] || [[word:dajufjuf|dajufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dajujuthu|dajujuthu]] || [[word:dajujuju|dajujuju]] || [[word:dajujushu|dajujushu]] || [[word:dajujuku|dajujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dajujuth|dajujuth]] || [[word:dajujuj|dajujuj]] || [[word:dajujush|dajujush]] || [[word:dajuju|dajuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dajujuthul|dajujuthul]] || [[word:dajujujul|dajujujul]] || [[word:dajujushul|dajujushul]] || [[word:dajujukul|dajujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dajujuthuthu|dajujuthuthu]] || [[word:dajujujuju|dajujujuju]] || [[word:dajujushushu|dajujushushu]] || [[word:dajujuku|dajujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dajujuthun|dajujuthun]] || [[word:dajujujun|dajujujun]] || [[word:dajujushun|dajujushun]] || [[word:dajujukun|dajujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dajujuthuoro|dajujuthuoro]] || [[word:dajujujuoro|dajujujuoro]] || [[word:dajujushuoro|dajujushuoro]] || [[word:dajujukuoro|dajujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
